languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} защищает, Лорд-капитан... и взывает к отмщению за павших! Позвольте {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровскому полку{/g} очистить ваш мир от ксеносской заразы".

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} защищает, Лорд-капитан... и взывает к отмщению за павших! Позвольте {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровскому полку{/g} очистить ваш мир от ксеносской заразы".

languages.text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."
languages.original_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g} защищает, Лорд-капитан... и взывает к отмщению за павших! Позвольте {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}меровскому полку{/g} очистить ваш мир от ксеносской заразы".

traits.locale_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

"The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

"It was obvious that we weren't going to get rid of those xenos easily. The God-Emperor protects, Lord Captain... and calls for vengeance against the enemy! Let the Merov Regiment restore their tarnished honour and carve the names of the fallen on the monsters' iron bones."

"The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

"The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

languages.text: 「この異星生物たちを簡単に倒すことはできないことが明らかでした。{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝{/g}は守ってくれる、そして敵への復讐を呼びかけるのです。{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メローヴ連隊{/g}は汚された名誉を取り戻し、倒れた者の名をこの異星生物の鉄骨に刻むのです」
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

traits.locale_text: 「この異星生物たちを簡単に倒すことはできないことが明らかでした。皇帝は守ってくれる、そして敵への復讐を呼びかけるのです。メローヴ連隊は汚された名誉を取り戻し、倒れた者の名をこの異星生物の鉄骨に刻むのです。」
「この異星生物たちを簡単に倒すことはできないことが明らかでした。{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}皇帝{/g}は守ってくれる、そして敵への復讐を呼びかけるのです。{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}メローヴ連隊{/g}は汚された名誉を取り戻し、倒れた者の名をこの異星生物の鉄骨に刻むのです」

languages.text: «El {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} protege, Lord Capitán... ¡y exige venganza por los caídos! Permita que el {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento de Merov{/g} purgue su mundo, erradicando la infestación de xenos».
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

traits.locale_text: «El {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g} protege, Lord Capitán... ¡y exige venganza por los caídos! Permita que el {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}regimiento de Merov{/g} purgue su mundo, erradicando la infestación de xenos».

languages.text: “愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑，舰长大人……祂也在召唤我们为死者复仇！让{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫军团{/g}去净化您行星上的异形灾害吧。”
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

traits.locale_text: “愿{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}庇佑，舰长大人……祂也在召唤我们为死者复仇！让{g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}梅罗夫军团{/g}去净化您行星上的异形灾害吧。”

languages.text: "Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} beschützt, Lord Captain ... und fordert Vergeltung für die Gefallenen! Lasst das {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov-Regiment{/g} Eure Welt vom Befall der Xenos reinigen."
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

traits.locale_text: "Der {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} beschützt, Lord Captain ... und fordert Vergeltung für die Gefallenen! Lasst das {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov-Regiment{/g} Eure Welt vom Befall der Xenos reinigen."

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} korur Lord Kaptan... Ayrıca O, şehitler için intikam çağrısı yapıyor! Bırakın {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Alayı{/g}, dünyanızı zeno istilasından temizlesin."
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} korur Lord Kaptan... Ayrıca O, şehitler için intikam çağrısı yapıyor! Bırakın {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Alayı{/g}, dünyanızı zeno istilasından temizlesin."

languages.text: « L'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} protège, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... et il réclame vengeance pour les morts ! Laissez le {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}régiment de Merov{/g} purger votre monde de l'infestation xénos. »
languages.original_text: "The {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g} protects, Lord Captain... and He calls for vengeance for the fallen! Let the {g|Encyclopedia:MerovPenalLegionGlossary}Merov Regiment{/g} purge your world of the xenos infestation."
